solutions.solution: Hence, there are a total of 32 triangles in the figure. (c) Clearly, shown that there are a total of 10 squares in the figure namely DABCD, CDIJKL, DIAGOE, DGBFO, DFCHO, EHIJOG, EHIMOP, EIMJQO, EGKNO and DNLPO

Pentagons in the figure as follow
Smallest pentagons = KLABM, BCDEN, EFGHO, HIJKP = 4
Medium pentagons = KMBEH, BNEHK, EOHKB, HPKBE = 4
Largest pentagons = KMBFG, BNEIJ, EOHLA, HPKCD = 4
∴ Total Pentagons = 4 + 4 + 4 = 12

Smallest hexagons
= MBCQPN, QQDSRP, TNPVIJ, UPRWHI = 4
Medium hexagons
= KLBCPIJ, JNCDRI, IPDEFH, GFDCPH, HRCBNI,
IPBALJ, LBCRIJ, NCDFHI, MBDSRN,
TNRWHJ = 10
Largest hexagons = LBDFHJ = 1
∴Total hexagons = 4 +10 + 1 = 15
Clearly shown that, total number of circles = 7
